description: Nigel Eccles discusses his background in online gambling, user acquisition strategies, and the growth of FanDuel from its inception in 2009 to its current status as a leading player in the U.S. market. He shares insights on the challenges faced in early user acquisition and the evolution of metrics over time.
topic_summary: Nigel Eccles shares his entrepreneurial journey in online gambling, focusing on user acquisition strategies and the growth of FanDuel from its early days to becoming a market leader. He emphasizes the importance of adapting strategies based on user feedback and market conditions [t=0:00 - t=2:00].
